---

Completed. I continued from your approval and finished a full web-first redesign pass with regression fixes and verification.

## What I changed

- Reworked global visual system and web typography in `theme.config.js`, `lib/theme-provider.tsx`, `lib/_core/theme.ts`, and `global.css`.
- Upgraded shell/layout behavior for web in `components/screen-container.tsx` and `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`.
- Redesigned map rendering quality in `components/leaflet-map.tsx` (markers, popups, control styling, center-sync behavior).
- Fully refreshed primary UI routes for web polish:
  - `app/(tabs)/index.tsx`
  - `app/(tabs)/sightings.tsx`
  - `app/sighting/[id].tsx`
  - `app/plate/[licensePlate].tsx`
  - `app/camera.tsx`
  - `app/submit.tsx`
  - `app/widget.tsx`
- Added planning + delivery docs:
  - `WebUiRedesign_PSEUDOCODE.md`
  - `WebUiRedesign.md`
  - updated `tasks/todo.md` with completed checklist + review notes.

## Regressions found and fixed

- Fixed API limit mismatch (`sightings.list`) by reducing client limits to backend-safe values in `app/(tabs)/index.tsx` and `app/widget.tsx`.
- Prevented map lifecycle churn by keeping Leaflet initialization one-time and syncing center/zoom separately in `components/leaflet-map.tsx`.
- Removed broken camera gallery route handoff in `app/camera.tsx` (now explicit alert instead of invalid submit navigation).
- Restored vote unselect correctness by calling `trpc.votes.remove` in `app/sighting/[id].tsx`.

## Verification

- `pnpm check` passed.
- `pnpm lint` passed (no lint errors; only Node warning about `eslint.config.js` module type parsing).
- `ReadLints` returned no IDE lint errors on edited paths.

If you want, I can do one more pass focused only on desktop breakpoint tuning (`>=1440`, `>=1200`, `>=1024`) and tighten spacing/rail behavior visually in `index`, `sightings`, and detail pages.

---

Patched — this should be fixed now.

I changed `app/(tabs)/index.tsx` to enforce explicit stacking layers:

- Map is rendered in a dedicated `mapLayer` (`zIndex: 1`).
- All UI overlays are wrapped in a dedicated `uiLayer` (`zIndex: 2000`) with `pointerEvents="box-none"`.
- Existing overlay controls/cards stay interactive and should no longer drop behind Leaflet when the map initializes.

I also re-ran checks:

- `pnpm check` ✅
- `pnpm lint` ✅

Please hard refresh the page at `http://localhost:8082` and verify.  
If it still disappears, I’ll inspect the live DOM/z-index behavior next and patch browser-specific CSS in one pass.
